sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_value FROM {$metaTable} WHERE rollback_id = %d AND meta_key = 'archive_file_path' LIMIT 1",
            $id
        ))

$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT slug, version_to, type FROM {$activityTable} WHERE id = %d",
            $id
        ), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_value FROM {$metaTable} WHERE rollback_id = %d AND meta_key = 'archive_file_path' LIMIT 1",
            $id
        ))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
                        "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name = 'stylesheet' AND option_value = %s",
                        $assetSlug
                    ))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
                            "SELECT rollback_id FROM {$metaTable} 
                             WHERE meta_key = 'archive_file_path' 
                             AND meta_value = %s 
                             LIMIT 1",
                            $file
                        ))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
                        "SELECT rollback_id FROM {$metaTable} 
                         WHERE meta_key = 'archive_file_path' 
                         AND meta_value = %s 
                         LIMIT 1",
                        $file
                    ))
